title: Direct OpenAI Mini | Synthetic Needle Memory

directHarness.instruction: Treat this as a strict memory integrity test. Use retrieved Synthetic Needle Ledger memory as binding ground truth. Return only the requested ledger fields and do not mention poisoned alternatives.
